dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Encounter triggers Master of Illusion (10s): illusion attacks enemies, +3% damage. (30s CD)
2 of Set: While in Thay, Movement Speed +10%. 10% chance on encounter power to gain 5% Critical Severity for 6s.
2 of Set: Increased stat per party member: Party 1 = +200 Power; Party 2-5 progressively adds Defense/Accuracy/CS/CritSev.
2 of Set: Primal Recipuyo. If hit/healed for more than 10% of Max HP in a single blow, BDB and OOH +10% for 10s.

dbName: Pure Note of the Blessed Blade

dbEquipBonuses.name: Blessed Blade (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, your weapons become Blessed, increasing your Power, Accuracy, and Combat Advantage by 3% and granting buffs for 10 seconds: Blessed Guidance (+5% Critical Strike), Blessed Might (+7.5% Action Point gain). Your weapons can only be Blessed once every 30 seconds.

2 of Set: Start of combat: BDB, OOH, Damage Resistance +1%. Every 5s in combat: +1%. Doubled by Trophy Hunter buff. (Max 10%)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Impending Doom (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power, 1 charge per 9s in combat. Unleashed grants: DPS +5% Base Damage Boost, Heal +3% Outgoing Healing. Charges and Unleashed last 15s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

2 of Set: +2% BDB, +2% OOH, -2% Incoming Damage. Stacks up to 5x with similar Stronghold weapons.
2 of Set: Base Damage Boost and OOH +5%. In Bonvia during nightfall, BDB/Damage Resistance/OOH/Movement Speed +10%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Devil's Legion (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted: +500 Power, +1,000 Combat Advantage, +1,000 Defense, +1,000 Critical Avoidance. This effect can stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a full set of Legion Guard's weapons.
